series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of copies of files from Industrial Commission from 1981. The files include but are not limited to the following: various United States Department of Labor Office of Workers’ compensation program forms/documents/orders, claimant employment information, various United States Department of Labor Office of Administrative Law Judges, prehearing/hearing orders, documents, claimant medical records, claimant earnings records, retirement/pension records, claimant employment records, employer policies/records, accident reports, human resources records, administrative and court legal documents/filings, attorney fees and cost records, administrative rules, correspondence, compensation and medical payment history, return receipts, calculations for claim reserves. and statistical information.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Black Lung files: file death of last beneficiary ; Electronic: Black Lung files: file death of last beneficiary
